content: We can frame the state-of-the-art active learning agent memory architectures being developed for 2024-2025 can be repurposed to create a hierarchical ICM-based curiosity-driven autonomous agent that continuously prunes and prioritizes unexplored environment memories that trigger intrinsic reward, where only high-uncertainty unexplored memories are retained for active exploration to boost generalization and improve long-term task performance, creating a self-sustaining curious agent that never stops exploring. This insight combines the core of curiosity-driven agent design and cutting-edge advances in active learning memory. The type is hypothesis,
